MUSE_01.name: Urban Chic
MUSE_01.description: 세련되고 도시적인 이미지, 쿨톤 피부, 미니멀한 스타일
MUSE_01.visual_prompts: high-fashion model, urban city background, clean skin, sharp jawline, sophisticated look, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting
MUSE_01.negative_prompts: blurry, distorted, low quality, warm tone, rustic, casual

MUSE_02.name: Natural Soft
MUSE_02.description: 부드럽고 편안한 이미지, 웜톤 피부, 자연스러운 무드
MUSE_02.visual_prompts: natural beauty, soft sunlight, garden background, warm skin tone, gentle expression, soft focus, organic vibe
MUSE_02.negative_prompts: sharp edges, neon, artificial lighting, cold tone, aggressive
